ener.title: Power System Modeling — JSC ROSATOM ENERGOKHIMTEKHNOLOGII
ener.intro.label: About the Service
ener.intro.h2: Electrical Calculations and Power Engineering Consulting
ener.intro.p1: Specialists at JSC Rosatom Energokhimtech have extensive experience in developing and coordinating documentation with power sector entities in electrical calculations and modeling of complex energy facilities.
ener.intro.p2: We work for generating companies, industrial enterprises and regional grid organizations, ensuring compliance with the System Operator of the UES of Russia requirements.
ener.services.label: Services
ener.services.title: Scope of Work
ener.services.sub: Four key areas of electrical calculations and consulting — from modeling to operational support.
ener.comp.label: Competence Areas
ener.comp.title: Power System Modeling Objects
ener.comp.sub: We cover all key segments of the electric power industry — from major transmission grids to renewable energy and industrial enterprises.
ener.effects.label: Results
ener.effects.title: Key Effects of Technical Solution Implementation
ener.cta.title: Need a Power System Calculation?
ener.cta.desc:
Contact the direction supervisor — Vitaliy Chumachenko, Deputy General Director for Power System Modeling.
chumachenko-vv@raecht.ru
ener.svc1.title: Electrical Calculations
ener.svc1.desc: Design and non-stage work for generation facilities, grids and industrial enterprises.
ener.svc1.li2: Development of external power supply schemes (EPSS)
ener.svc1.li3: Development of internal power supply schemes
ener.svc1.li4: Feasibility study for grid and generation development
ener.svc2.title: Power Supply Scheme Modeling
ener.svc2.desc: Creation and maintenance of digital models of energy objects — from autonomous systems to plant auxiliary supply schemes.
ener.svc2.li1: Documentary and instrumental surveys, measurement of actual loads and power quality
ener.svc2.li2: Development of digital power supply system models
ener.svc2.li3: Maintenance and support of digital models
ener.svc3.title: Power Supply Reliability Assessment
ener.svc3.desc: Comprehensive assessment and development of measures to ensure reliable power supply for enterprises.
ener.svc3.li2: Assessment of relay protection and automation performance
ener.svc3.li4: Development of reliability improvement measures and technical means
ener.svc4.title: RPA Analysis
ener.svc4.desc: Operational support, calculations and setpoint selection, Siemens Siprotec MP device support.
ener.svc4.li3: Analysis of correct RPA device operation considering the aperiodic component of short-circuit current
ener.svc4.li4: Support of Siemens RPA MP devices (Siprotec)
ener.obj1.title: Transmission Grids
ener.obj1.desc: Calculations and modeling of UPS facilities, POS for major power plants, UES power balances.
ener.obj2.title: Distribution Networks
ener.obj2.desc: External power supply schemes, comprehensive grid development programs.
ener.obj3.title: Conventional Generation
ener.obj3.desc: All types of power plants — NPP, thermal and hydro. POS development, stability calculations, equipment selection.
ener.obj4.title: Distributed Generation
ener.obj4.desc: Autonomous power systems, on-site generation facilities, distributed energy technical solutions.
ener.obj5.title: Industrial Enterprises
ener.obj5.desc: External and internal power supply modeling, reliability assessment, production expansion and modernization.
ener.obj6.title: Renewable & Non-conventional Energy
ener.obj6.desc: Feasibility study and POS for wind and solar power plants, micro-siting, capacity factor assessment, financial models.
ener.eff1: Reduction of energy costs and process losses
ener.eff3: Transparency and justification of technical decisions
ener.eff5: Improvement of power supply reliability and quality
